reasons: localized structured geography route and global navigation
reviewed facility, residency, and habitat public projections
public location precision and country-level privacy semantics
map provider attribution, failure, and export contract

reproducibility.detail: GitHub Actions completed the pinned default Release Gate from clean Linux and Windows checkouts for immutable implementation commit c2e2eec; both jobs passed, preserved tracked-file cleanliness, and uploaded reports with recorded SHA-256 digests.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production and OpenNext builds, release ownership, public-boundary, provider-contract, and frontend-evidence checks pass locally and in Linux and Windows clean checkouts.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29576672540 Linux and Windows default gates: PASS

public_contracts.detail: The localized map route uses canonical URL state for mode, focus, country, status, immutable data snapshot, and selected result; invalid values normalize by permanent redirect; /map and /global-distribution redirect by request language while preserving task state.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Institutions and individual footprints derive from reviewed facilities and residency records; current and historical states remain distinct; wild conservation data is identified as live API or a named partial cached public release; public precision is facility, locality, province, or country and precise geometry is not exposed in structured result content.
evidence: Staging live API returned 6 conservation features with latest snapshot 2026-03-05
Staging page rendered PandaAtlas live habitat API source state rather than cached-release state
country-level records are not rendered as institution points: PASS

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 46-test browser suite passes locally and against immutable Staging, covering all three structured map modes, reviewed current and historical footprints, URL normalization, result selection, bilingual state preservation, native keyboard controls, no-JavaScript rendering, legacy redirects, existing Atlas/profile/lineage journeys, and provider-free completion.
evidence: test-only live API multiplicity fix commit 9ba4199a3ddeca54d1472ca50f645d4f8fbaeaad

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English structured map pages pass desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans, native keyboard filtering, no-horizontal-overflow checks, and reduced-motion verification locally and against immutable Staging.
evidence: Chinese institutions and English wild-conservation desktop/mobile axe journeys: PASS
mobile native structured-map filter journey: PASS

visual_regression.detail: The immutable Slice 6 Staging deployment is bound to this implementation, but a named semantic visual review of the bilingual structured map journey is not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The production and OpenNext builds report 107 kB First Load JS for the localized structured map route, below the 220 KiB structured-route budget and without loading MapLibre or external map tiles.

staging.detail: Implementation commit c2e2eec is bound to an immutable Cloudflare frontend Version ID and a reproducible OpenNext directory checksum; complete browser and automated accessibility suites pass against the deployed Staging URL, and the Staging route consumes the real public habitat API.
evidence: OpenNext directory sha256:e3a6a84a84cd61f99b087851a7ab955b38aa163c20a0c86a55c91b83165aca4b across 1387 files using sorted relative path + NUL + bytes + NUL
Staging browser suite 46/46 PASS; automated accessibility suite 22/22 PASS
Real habitat API verification: 6 features; latest snapshot 2026-03-05; Staging live-source rendering PASS

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual geography wording, current versus historical semantics, public precision, source states, provider attribution, mobile reflow, and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 6.

release_decision.detail: Clean-checkout automation, immutable Staging identity, real API verification, browser journeys, and automated accessibility are complete for Slice 6, but named semantic visual and product-owner review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
